evidence_preview.entity: reduced brood size in C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants
evidence_preview.subsection: Loss of mus-81 does not result in obvious meiotic defects
evidence_preview.verified_quote: C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants exhibited no obvious phenotypes attributed to meiotic defects such as a high frequency of embryonic inviability or an increased frequency of XO males. mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005) (Table 1).
